{{Hatnote|This page refers to the study of [[internet memes]] for the study of [[memes]] in a phenotypic sense see [[memetics]]}}Memeology is the study of [[internet memes]].

It is useful as a way for generating [[propaganda]] and understanding how it spreads. It is considered a subdiscipline of [[memetics]].

Resources such as knowyourmeme are very useful for memeology. Despite or perhaps because of its narrow scope memeology is a lot more developed than [[memetics]].
[[Category:Memes]]
[[sn:Memeology]][[Category:Memeology]]
[[sn:Memeology]][[Category:Memetics]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Memeology]][[Category:Internet memes]]
[[sn:Memeology]][[Category:Evolutionist Online Infrastructure]]
[[sn:Memeology]]
[[Category:Pages]]
